ticket_goal: Develop functionality to extract key frames from uploaded videos and use AI to suggest high-click-through-rate (CTR) thumbnails for optimized platform performance.

scrum-master.verdict: New Feature. Routing to discovery-agent for architecture planning and technical specs.

technical_specs: Implement frame extraction in `src/lib/video/processor.ts` using `fluent-ffmpeg` to grab 3-5 keyframes at intervals.
Resize extracted frames to max 1080px width before AI processing to save bandwidth.
Integrate Vision API (Gemini or OpenAI) in `src/lib/core/ai.ts` to rank the base64 frames based on CTR potential (faces, emotion, contrast, clarity).
Create API route `/api/media/thumbnails` for generating suggestions asynchronously.
Update `MediaLibrary.tsx` UI to allow users to trigger thumbnail suggestions and select the best one.
Apply Upstash rate limits (e.g., 10 per day per user) for the AI generation to prevent cost overruns.
Ensure extracted frames are discarded if unused or upon selection.

fixes_applied: Implemented extractKeyframes with fluent-ffmpeg in processor.ts
Added Gemini-1.5-pro powered rankThumbnails in ai.ts
Created /api/media/thumbnails POST route to integrate logic
Updated MediaLibrary.tsx with AI Thumbnail button and preview Dialog
Added unit test ai.test.ts to verify ranking logic
